title: Integrations
unavailable: Integrations are not available in this setup.

signin.title: Sign in to connect apps
signin.body: Sign in to Houston to connect your apps. Your accounts stay yours; the agent acts on your behalf.
signin.failed: Sign-in couldn't start. Please try again.

reconnectNotice: We upgraded how apps connect to make it more secure. Please reconnect your apps once; Houston no longer keeps any long-lived key for them.

connectResult.timeout: The connection didn't finish. Please try again.
connectResult.failed: The app couldn't be connected. Please try again.

disconnect.confirmBody: This removes {{name}} for all of your agents, not just this one. You can reconnect it anytime.

waiting.title: Finish connecting {{app}}
waiting.body: We opened {{app}} in your browser. Sign in there, then come back here.

pendingRecovery.body: You started connecting {{app}} but did not finish signing in.

locked.heading: Turned off in your workspace
locked.subtitle: Your admin picked which apps can be used here. They exist on Houston, they are just off in this workspace.
locked.more_one: {{count}} more app turned off in your workspace
locked.more_other: {{count}} more apps turned off in your workspace

home.title: Integrations
home.description: Work with your agents across your favorite tools.

runsWithoutAsking.heading: Runs without asking
runsWithoutAsking.subtitle: You allowed this agent to run these app actions without checking with you first. Remove one and Houston will ask again.

custom.title: Custom integrations
custom.description: Connect an API or MCP server that isn't in the app catalog.
custom.empty: No custom integrations yet. Add one to connect a tool that isn't in the catalog.
custom.noResults: No custom integrations match your search.

keyDialog.title: Enter the key for {{name}}
keyDialog.description: Your key is stored securely and never shown in chat.
keyDialog.savedUnverifiedToast: Key saved for {{name}}. The service hasn't confirmed it yet.

delete.title: Remove {{name}}?
delete.description: Your agents will lose access to its actions. This can't be undone.

setupChat.bannerTitle: You are setting up a custom integration in chat
setupChat.bannerDescription: Pick up where you left off, or discard the draft chat.
setupChat.doneToast: Nice! Your custom integration is ready to use.

custom.catalogUnavailable: The app catalog isn't available in this setup, but you can still add custom integrations.
